{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323033622F72BE179F90DBDA084EF"}"},"total":44},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7562459341318570777","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完141章
越来越喜欢女主，很喜欢作者对于女主的一些描写，总感觉女主有一股纯真的力量，特别是在之前，女主做采访的那里，就觉得女主很好很好，非常奇妙。个人不知道怎么形容，但事实就是女主玩的很开心，我看的很开心。
至于关于评论区女主给男人花钱，只有几章，很快女主就意识到了，跳过就可以，然后有关于系统召唤出来的人不听女主的话，不是的，很听女主的话，只是下意识想要在女主那里，占据话语权。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760775225,"group_id":"7536928862303685656","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4431464933896067"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7536928862303685656","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"304"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19605,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7547056962161591065","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完55章。
看的真的很开心，很开心。虽然没有逻辑，但是毕竟是神豪文，够爽就够了。
一开始写的有点尬尬的，因为女主是普通人的心态和突如其来的财富，但后来就越写越好，个人也看的十分舒适，就是要有一种理所应当，我应该拥有最好的，配得感。","text_exts":[{"e":61,"s":58,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774208182BDA084EF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227547056962161591065%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227536928862303685656%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757190787,"group_id":"7536928862303685656","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"杂食党一枚，喜欢在推荐榜挖掘小苗苗
